summary: Strict refactor lands clean. 49 layout objects extracted into public/layouts/street-block.layout.json with 0 unreferenced keys and 0 leftover literals in this.add.* calls. World-size resolution correct (1000×700 — all 7 width/2-centered objects resolve to x=500, none to 400 or 512). Zero behavior changes — diff inspection confirmed no saveGame, audioMgr, playSfx, transitionToScene, dialogEvent, speaker, text, or MCP.emit lines added or removed. review_method: Native code-quality-reviewer dispatch SKIPPED entirely per user protocol change 2026-04-26 (saved memory: feedback_skip_native_reviewer_this_session.md). Reviewer stall rate this session is 7/7 across both haiku and sonnet variants. Orchestrator ran the full verification checklist directly: build re-verification + literal-coords grep + JSON structural via node + world-size correctness check + setOrigin-not-in-JSON check + behavior-line grep against the diff.

low.summary: 10 of 49 layout objects have _note fields (vs. 37 of 60 on ZuzuGarage). Lower _note ratio is appropriate — StreetBlockScene has fewer computed expressions (mostly width/2 centerings + 'height + 10' wall_south offset). All 7 width/2-centered objects correctly resolve to x=500.

Worker hoisted two arrays to JSON per spec section 8: trees (8 entries of {x,y}) and plants (10 entries of {species,label,x,y,radius}). The plants entries include species/label fields alongside coords — this is correct because the loop body consumes both positional + identity fields together; separating them would force two parallel arrays the loop has to zip. Worker noted this judgment call in receipt.

Three positions correctly LEFT IN CODE per spec exemptions: (1) road dash loop at line 60 (loop-generated, exempt §8); (2) reward celebration coords using cam.scrollX + cam.width/2 (per-frame dynamic, exempt §7); (3) setOrigin/setDepth/font sizes/stroke widths/colors/interaction radii (styling not layout).

setOrigin_in_json_check.result: no match — setOrigin correctly stays in code

behavior_line_check.interpretation: ZERO behavior changes. Refactor is purely positional.
